##NAMES=Guyanaite
##RRUFFID=R070444
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=CrO(OH)
##LOCALITY=Merume river, Kamakusa, Mazaruni District, Guyana
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Michael Scott
##DESCRIPTION=Black alluvial grains, a mixture of guyanaite, bracewellite, eskolaite and quartz, colloquially known as merumite
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed only by X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R070444
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Powder, mixture includes bracewellite, eskolaite and quartz
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 4.8773 b: 4.3111 c: 2.9547 alpha: 90 beta: 90 gamma: 90 volume: 62.127 crystal system: orthorhombic
##FILETYPE=Raman RAW
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=532
